Impulse Response Analysis Report - Example-IR

Analysis for file: Example-IR.wav

Note: AmbiX B-Format detected (ACN: W, Y, Z, X). Full 3D spatial analysis applied.

Acoustic Parameters (Broadband / Mono)

ParameterValue
Center Time (Ts)Center of gravity of the IR. Target: < 80 ms for speech, 80-150 ms for music. Lower values correlate with acoustic intimacy. 50.3 ms
Bass Ratio (BR)Low to mid-frequency RT60 ratio. Target: 1.1 - 1.25 for concert halls (warmth). Values > 1.5 indicate boominess. 1.00
Treble Ratio (TR)High to mid-frequency RT60 ratio. Target: 0.8 - 1.0. Typically falls below 1.0 due to air absorption. 0.77
EDT (Early Decay Time)Perceived reverberance. Target: 0.2s - 0.4s for control rooms, 1.0s - 2.0s for concert halls. 0.71 s
RT60 (from T30)Standard broad-band reverberation time. Targets depend strictly on room volume and intended purpose. 0.70 s
C50 (Speech Clarity)Early-to-late energy ratio. Target: > 2 dB for excellent speech intelligibility. 1.89 dB
C80 (Music Clarity)Early-to-late energy ratio. Target: -2 dB to +4 dB depending on musical genre (higher for rhythmic, lower for choral). 5.53 dB
D50 (Definition)Percentage of early energy. Target: > 50% for good speech definition. 60.72 %
First ReflectionTime delay between direct sound and first boundary reflection. Target: > 15 - 20 ms to avoid comb filtering. 4.21 ms

Spatial Parameters (Ambisonics)

ParameterValue
Early Lateral Fraction (LF80)Ratio of early lateral energy. Target: 0.10 to 0.35 for good spatial envelopment. 0.49
